{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Sword-aspect Path
| introduced = cradle-01-unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|The [[sword]]-aspect [[Path]] is a path taken beyond anything in [[Sacred Valley]].<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c19">''Unsouled'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Terminology]]
